title: A Quiet Place: Day One Box Office Summary and Records
text: A Quiet Place: Day One grossed a worldwide box office total of $261 million following its June 28, 2024 release. The earnings split nearly evenly between domestic ($139 million, 53%) and international ($122 million, 47%) markets. With a production budget of $67 million, the prequel earned roughly four times its production costs at the global box office, representing a substantial commercial success despite unpredictable market conditions for franchise films in 2024. The film achieved the best opening weekend yet in the Quiet Place franchise's history with $98.5 million globally ($53 million domestic, $45.5 million international). This surpassed industry projections of $40-50 million domestically, though it finished second to Inside Out 2 that weekend. While Day One underperformed compared to the original film ($341 million worldwide), it remained competitive with Part II ($297 million worldwide). The prequel earned $2.8 million more than the first film during opening weekend despite being the franchise's lowest-grossing entry overall.
